title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in React, Next.js, and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind CSS. Experience with state management and building scalable UI components is essential.

title: React Developer
description: Seeking a React Developer to join our core product team. You will be dealing with complex component logic, React hooks, REST APIs, and performance optimization in large single page applications.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Looking for a Full Stack Developer skilled in Node.js, Express, React, and PostgreSQL. You will build and maintain APIs, integrate third-party services, and work on frontend features.

title: Web Developer (React/Next.js)
description: Join our agency! We need a Web Developer who excels at translating Figma designs into responsive Next.js pages using Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for animations.

title: UI/UX Developer
description: We need a hybrid designer and developer. Proficiency in CSS animations, accessibility standards, frontend testing frameworks, and Javascript is required.

title: Frontend Team Lead
description: Leadership role for an experienced frontend architect. Expertise in TypeScript, Next.js App Router, performance auditing, and mentoring junior engineers.

title: Data Scientist
description: Looking for a Data Scientist familiar with Python, pandas, scikit-learn, and NLP libraries like spaCy and NLTK. Experience with transformer models is a plus.

title: Backend Python Developer
description: We are seeking a backend developer proficient in Python, Flask, FastAPI, and working with complex database queries, SQLAlchemy, and microservices architecture.
